What you effectively get is that would add a couple billion to revenue for the Mac business,” Munster added.
In 2025, Apple’s Mac business generated $33.7 billion in revenue, up from $30 billion in 2024.

That makes it Apple’s fourth-largest segment by total sales, behind the iPhone, which brought in $209.5 billion; Services, which brought in $109.2 billion; and Wearables, which generated $35.7 billion.
Apple’s iPad business brought in $28 billion for the year.
